title: Ejecutivo de medios offline
skills: Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación, Administración o afines.
Experiencia mínima de 2 años en implementación, ejecución y seguimiento de campañas offline.
Experiencia indispensable en agencias de medios o centrales de medios.
Conocimiento de medios tradicionales como TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas.
Inglés intermedio.
Manejo de Excel y herramientas de seguimiento y control de campañas.
Apoyar en la elaboración de planes tácticos mediante análisis de audiencias, competencia y tendencias de mercado.
Ejecutar la compra de medios tradicionales (TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas) de acuerdo con los planes aprobados por el cliente.
Gestionar la generación y seguimiento de órdenes de compra en los sistemas internos de la compañía.
Coordinar el envío de materiales creativos y dar seguimiento con medios y proveedores para la correcta implementación de campañas.
Solicitar, recopilar y validar testigos para asegurar la correcta transmisión o publicación de las campañas.
Monitorear campañas activas y dar seguimiento a incidencias durante su ejecución.
Realizar conciliaciones de campañas verificando que la ejecución coincida con lo planeado y contratado.
Gestionar el cierre administrativo de campañas y órdenes de compra para el proceso de facturación.
Elaborar reportes post-buy y análisis de resultados de campaña.
Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.
Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.
Un espacio seguro y libre de discriminación, donde cada voz es valorada y cada persona realmente importa.
description:
About the job

Acerca de nosotros




Somos una agencia global, especialista en medios, marketing y tecnología. Líderes en el ramo con presencia en más de 100 países. Creamos soluciones integrales para todos nuestros clientes de forma rápida y eficaz.




Nuestra búsqueda constante de mejorar en lo que hacemos comienza contactando con personas como tú.




OMG te invita a unirte a nuestro equipo como: Ejecutivo de medios offline




¿Qué buscamos?




Buscamos un perfil con experiencia en la ejecución y seguimiento de campañas de medios tradicionales dentro de agencias de medios o centrales de medios, con interés en desarrollarse en un entorno dinámico y colaborativo.




Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación, Administración o afines.
Experiencia mínima de 2 años en implementación, ejecución y seguimiento de campañas offline.
Experiencia indispensable en agencias de medios o centrales de medios.
Conocimiento de medios tradicionales como TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas.
Inglés intermedio.
Manejo de Excel y herramientas de seguimiento y control de campañas.




¿Cuáles son las principales actividades?




Apoyar en la elaboración de planes tácticos mediante análisis de audiencias, competencia y tendencias de mercado.
Ejecutar la compra de medios tradicionales (TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas) de acuerdo con los planes aprobados por el cliente.
Gestionar la generación y seguimiento de órdenes de compra en los sistemas internos de la compañía.
Coordinar el envío de materiales creativos y dar seguimiento con medios y proveedores para la correcta implementación de campañas.
Solicitar, recopilar y validar testigos para asegurar la correcta transmisión o publicación de las campañas.
Monitorear campañas activas y dar seguimiento a incidencias durante su ejecución.
Realizar conciliaciones de campañas verificando que la ejecución coincida con lo planeado y contratado.
Gestionar el cierre administrativo de campañas y órdenes de compra para el proceso de facturación.
Elaborar reportes post-buy y análisis de resultados de campaña.




¿Qué ofrecemos?




Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.
Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.
Un espacio seguro y libre de discriminación, donde cada voz es valorada y cada persona realmente importa.




Si estás buscando más que solo un empleo y quieres formar parte de una comunidad que te inspira y te impulsa a alcanzar tu máximo potencial, ¡nos encantaría conocerte!




En OMG NO discriminamos por razón de raza, origen étnico, edad, sexo, género, estado civil, ideología, opiniones políticas, nacionalidad, religión, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género o cualquier otra condición personal, física o social. A través de ello, construimos una cultura incluyente, de respeto y diversa.

title: Associate, Investment, Search
skills: Facilitate building, launching and maintaining digital campaigns for assigned accounts across digital channel(s) in support of the paid media strategy

Execute ongoing media activation and maintenance tasks, including but not limited to, account pacing, keyword analysis, optimization, forecasting, etc. as well as working with various internal/external teams to drive an exceptional client experience
Utilize strong analytical skills to extract insights from campaign data and provide well developed quantitatively based recommendations to accomplish client goals and objectives
Assist in development of media strategy and recommendation and helping with elements of client presentations
Ensure flawless execution of assigned media buys by deploying best practices in digital operations and quality assurance for all campaign launch / modifications
Support the pacing, optimization and management of campaigns, as applicable
Monitor campaign performance through regular delivery reporting, ensuring buys are properly executed and troubleshoot issues that arise
Facilitate the analysis and interpretation of data trends and develop improvement solutions
Collaborate with leadership and peers to develop solutions that will enhance our operational efficiency, tools, and systems, and improve current workflows
Represent Rise to vendor reps to analyze value and applicability of media vehicles/tactics for plan consideration as needed
Bachelor’s degree (communications, marketing, advertising, or business)
Ability to speak, read and write the English language
0-2 years relevant work experience in digital media planning, buying or execution preferred; agency experience a plus
Experience with Microsoft Office suite; foundational / practical experience with Excel a plus
Working knowledge of media platform management tools preferred; experience with Google Marketing Platform, Google Ads, The Trade Desk and Facebook Business Manager recommended but not required
Working knowledge of the importance and role of programmatic, paid social and paid search within a media plan
Ability to convert and implement strategic plan directions into flawless tactical executions
Certificates in Google Ads, Google Marketing Platform, Google Analytics, The Trade Desk Edge, Facebook Blueprint, Microsoft Ads and IAB Digital Media Planning & Buying are a plus but not require
description:
About the job

Rise is an award-winning, full-service Media Agency of Record that is backed by data and powered by people. We create omnichannel experiences using our proprietary tech stack and advanced analytics capabilities to help solve the unique struggles brands face today. This approach, with transparency at its core, specializes in omnichannel media, commerce and retail media, advanced in-home media, as well as content and creator marketing.

We offer "Risers" the opportunity to work in an ever-evolving industry that will foster learning and development, provide an innovative work environment with diverse projects and clients, career advancement paths a collaborative team environment, corporate social responsibility initiatives, an inclusive and diverse culture, plus association with a reputable media agency. We're looking for talent like you who can continue to elevate our work and culture.


Facilitate building, launching and maintaining digital campaigns for assigned accounts across digital channel(s) in support of the paid media strategy
Execute ongoing media activation and maintenance tasks, including but not limited to, account pacing, keyword analysis, optimization, forecasting, etc. as well as working with various internal/external teams to drive an exceptional client experience
Utilize strong analytical skills to extract insights from campaign data and provide well developed quantitatively based recommendations to accomplish client goals and objectives
Assist in development of media strategy and recommendation and helping with elements of client presentations
Ensure flawless execution of assigned media buys by deploying best practices in digital operations and quality assurance for all campaign launch / modifications
Support the pacing, optimization and management of campaigns, as applicable
Monitor campaign performance through regular delivery reporting, ensuring buys are properly executed and troubleshoot issues that arise
Facilitate the analysis and interpretation of data trends and develop improvement solutions
Collaborate with leadership and peers to develop solutions that will enhance our operational efficiency, tools, and systems, and improve current workflows
Represent Rise to vendor reps to analyze value and applicability of media vehicles/tactics for plan consideration as needed


Education

Job Requirements: 


Bachelor’s degree (communications, marketing, advertising, or business)
Ability to speak, read and write the English language


Experience


0-2 years relevant work experience in digital media planning, buying or execution preferred; agency experience a plus
Experience with Microsoft Office suite; foundational / practical experience with Excel a plus
Working knowledge of media platform management tools preferred; experience with Google Marketing Platform, Google Ads, The Trade Desk and Facebook Business Manager recommended but not required
Working knowledge of the importance and role of programmatic, paid social and paid search within a media plan
Ability to convert and implement strategic plan directions into flawless tactical executions


Certificates, Licenses, Registrations


Certificates in Google Ads, Google Marketing Platform, Google Analytics, The Trade Desk Edge, Facebook Blueprint, Microsoft Ads and IAB Digital Media Planning & Buying are a plus but not require


We offer comprehensive benefits for eligible employees including medical, prescription, dental and vision insurance, 401(k) retirement savings, paid time off, holidays and additional benefits.

Rise and Quad are proud to be equal opportunity employers. We are committed to creating a place of belonging — a space where employees do not need to sacrifice who they are to exist and grow in our workplace. Rise and Quad do not discriminate on any unlawful basis including race, religion, color, national origin, disability, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, genetic information, or any other basis prohibited by applicable federal, state, or local laws. Rise and Quad also prohibit harassment of applicants and employees based on any of these protected categories.

Drug-Free Workplace

Persona is where the world’s best companies and the world’s best talent meet.





We place exceptional people from 98 countries into full-time, long-term remote roles with the most ambitious companies on earth. Fortune 500 enterprises, fast-growing startups backed by Sequoia, Founders Fund, and Andreessen Horowitz, and high-performing companies of every size in between. skills: Develop and maintain a strong relationship with KOL
Manage our reference and training sites
Execute advanced application on our top clients.
Support KOL to produce outcomes creating local evidences to be distributes as sales collaterals.
Collect competition clinical information and prepare arguments to win over.
Organize & perform equipment and AW remote demonstration

description:
About the job

Job Description Summary

Coach, drive and lead lean behaviors, principles, and tools across a operational or functional area. Drive cultural transformation resulting in step-change in operational business metrics.

Job Description

GE Healthcare is a leading global medical technology and digital solutions innovator with over 100 years of healthcare industry experience and around 50,000 employees globally.

We enable clinicians to make faster, more informed decisions through intelligent devices, data analytics, applications and services, supported by our Edison intelligence platform. We operate at the center of an ecosystem working toward precision health -digitizing healthcare, helping drive productivity and improving outcomes for patients, providers, health systems and researchers around the world.

Mission: Suport customers througout their journey – pre and post sales


Develop and maintain a strong relationship with KOL
Manage our reference and training sites
Execute advanced application on our top clients.
Support KOL to produce outcomes creating local evidences to be distributes as sales collaterals.
Collect competition clinical information and prepare arguments to win over.
Organize & perform equipment and AW remote demonstration
Provide clinical training for PSS.
Identify leads while visiting customers - Lead generator
Organize clinical images library and distribute it for sales team


GE Healthcare is an Equal Opportunity Employer where inclusion matters. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.

We expect all employees to live and breathe our behaviors: to act with humility and build trust; lead with transparency; deliver with focus, and drive ownership – always with unyielding integrity.

Our total rewards are designed to unlock your ambition by giving you the boost and flexibility you need to turn your ideas into world-changing realities. Our salary and benefits are everything you’d expect from an organization with global strength and scale, and you’ll be surrounded by career opportunities in a culture that fosters care, collaboration and support.

Additional Information

description:
About the job

Job Title: Conversational AI Engineer (Remote)
Work Mode: Fully Remote
Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)




Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices
Rate AI responses across key dimensions including correctness, instruction-following, and quality
Write original computer science questions and coding challenges to test AI capabilities
Identify bugs, errors, and inconsistencies in AI-generated code using structured guidelines
Provide clear, constructive, and structured written feedback to improve AI responses
Follow project guidelines, quality standards, and confidentiality requirements




Qualifications

Software engineering experience — junior, mid-level, or senior welcome
Proficiency in one or more of the following: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Swift, or Rust
Strong attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills
Background in full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, or any engineering discipline




Eligibility Requirements

Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations:
Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela




Compensation

Earn up to $34 USD/hr — core project rate with additional performance incentives averaging 7.5% on top
Payments issued weekly via supported payout platforms (e.g., PayPal or AirTM)




Work Arrangement

Fully remote and asynchronous
Flexible workload depending on project availability
Free access to leading AI tools worth $200+/month included




Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.




Ready to put your coding skills to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences
description:
About the job

Summary

Description Summary of This Role

Responsible for managing marketing, advertising and promotional activities for various products or channels. Takes steps to measure, enhance, and enrich the position and image of the company through various goals and objectives. Plan and execute day-to-day marketing activities in support of a product, service or channel. Help prepare and adhere to budgets. Oversee creation and delivery of advertising and marketing materials and ensure brand messages are consistent. Collaborate with sales and product to develop strategic partnership activities and implement the execution the identified opportunities.

What Part Will You Play?


Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.
Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.
Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.
Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.
Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.


What Are We Looking For in This Role?

Minimum Qualifications


Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp


Preferred Qualifications


Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.


What Are Our Desired Skills and Capabilities?


Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).
Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences

title: Demand Generation Manager
skills: Diseñar, implementar y gestionar campañas pagas en plataformas como Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta (Facebook e Instagram), YouTube Ads, Spotify Ads, native ads (Outbrain o Taboola) y programmatic ads.

Definir y aplicar estrategias de segmentación con audiencias personalizadas, audiencias similares (lookalike audiences), retargeting dinámico y señales de intención de compra (buyer intent signals).

Administrar y optimizar el presupuesto asignado a campañas, asegurando la máxima eficiencia en la generación de demanda.
Sincronizar campañas pagadas con HubSpot y otras plataformas de automatización de marketing para mejorar el lead nurturing y el retargeting dinámico.

Experiencia comprobable (mínimo 4 años) en gestión, ejecución y optimización de campañas de Demand Generation Manager, Paid Media, Performance Marketing Manager en entornos B2B, con foco en generación de demanda y leads calificados.

Google Ads
Meta Ads (Facebook e Instagram)
LinkedIn Ads
YouTube Ads
Native Ads (Outbrain, Taboola)
Programmatic Ads (DV360, Criteo, The Trade Desk)
Experiencia sólida en optimización basada en datos, trabajando con KPIs como CTR, CPC, CPL, CPA, ROAS y ROI, y tomando decisiones de inversión en tiempo real.
Experiencia en automatización y optimización avanzada, utilizando herramientas como:
Google Smart Bidding
Performance Max
Google Ads Scripts
Meta Automated Rules

skills: Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).

description:

Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that specializes in pairing remote work with top-tier talent!

We are dedicated to connecting talented individuals with remarkable companies in need of their skills. Our goal is to create fulfilling job opportunities for professionals around the world.

Our client:



Looking for a Junior Media Buyer who wants to learn the performance marketing craft properly. This is a hands-in-the-account role from day one for someone obsessed with what makes an ad account scale profitably, not just spend. You will work hand-in-hand with senior buyers to plan, launch, and optimize paid campaigns primarily on Meta, with growing responsibility on AppLovin / Axon.

You don't need years of experience, but you do need sharp instincts, comfort with numbers, and the drive to get great at this fast. You'll be building campaigns, reading data, spotting what's working, and learning to make confident scale/kill decisions across a portfolio of fast-growing DTC e-commerce brands.

This is a high-performance environment built for hungry, ambitious people who take real ownership of their accounts and treat client budgets like their own.

You'll be responsible for


Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).

Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.

Requirements


0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.

Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.

Benefits

Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.

description:
About the job

Creator Growth Specialist

Salary: $2,000 USD per month

Type: Full-time

Location: 100% Remote

Role Overview

We are hiring a Creator Growth Specialist to support a portfolio of content creators across audience growth, content strategy, creator operations, and monetization initiatives.

This is not a traditional influencer marketing role. We are looking for someone with hands-on experience working directly with creators to help them grow their audiences, strengthen their personal brands, optimize content performance, and expand revenue opportunities across today's creator economy.

The ideal candidate understands how creators build sustainable businesses through content strategy, audience engagement, platform optimization, and multiple monetization channels.

Key Responsibilities

Manage a portfolio of content creators as their primary point of contact.
Develop and execute audience growth strategies across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Advise creators on content planning, performance optimization, audience engagement, and platform best practices.
Create and manage content calendars to support consistent publishing.
Assist with copywriting, editing, scheduling, publishing, and content organization.
Analyze creator performance and provide data-driven recommendations to improve growth.
Monitor platform updates, creator economy trends, and emerging opportunities.
Identify opportunities to increase audience engagement, reach, follower growth, and content performance.
Support creator monetization through TikTok Shop, affiliate marketing, brand partnerships, LTK, social commerce, YouTube monetization, and other revenue channels.
Help creators identify new monetization opportunities aligned with their audience and content niche.
Track campaigns, partnerships, affiliate programs, and creator performance within internal systems.
Maintain accurate records in CRM platforms, Monday.com, and other operational tools.
Coordinate communication between creators, internal teams, and brand partners.
Support partnership administration, campaign tracking, invoicing, and operational processes.

Requirements

Resume in English.
Native or near-native English proficiency (spoken and written).
3+ years of experience in creator talent management, creator partnerships, creator success, creator operations, or the creator economy.
Proven experience working directly with content creators, influencers, personal brands, or creator rosters.
Demonstrated success helping creators grow audiences, improve content performance, and increase monetization.
Strong understanding of creator business models and the creator economy.
Deep knowledge of TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Experience developing content strategies, growth plans, and audience engagement initiatives.
Strong copywriting, content planning, and content optimization skills.
Experience analyzing creator performance metrics and turning insights into actionable recommendations.
Experience supporting creator monetization through affiliate marketing, TikTok Shop, brand partnerships, social commerce, LTK, YouTube monetization, subscriptions, or similar revenue channels.
Experience using CRM platforms, Monday.com, or similar project management tools.
Strong organizational, communication, and relationship management skills.
Comfortable managing multiple creators and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.

title: Talent Account Executive 1
description:
About the job

LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.



Join us to transform the way the world works.





Job Description



This role will be based in Mexico City.



At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team. 



LinkedIn is looking for a Talent Solutions Account Executive I (TAE1) to join our New Business team in Mexico City. This role is focused on driving new customer acquisition across a high-volume SMB territory, building strong pipeline through outbound prospecting, and closing new business opportunities across Hiring and Learning solutions. 



Success in this role requires strong discipline in pipeline management, excellent time management, and the ability to prioritize effectively across a large number of accounts and opportunities. The ideal candidate is highly organized, action-oriented, collaborative, leverages AI and data to increase productivity, and thrives in a fast-paced, high-activity sales environment. While the territory is primarily SMB-focused, the ability to identify and close larger strategic opportunities is considered a strong differentiator. 



Responsibilities:



• Own new business acquisition within a defined SMB territory, ensuring strong account coverage and prioritization of the highest-potential opportunities 

• Develop and execute a territory strategy focused on scale, efficiency, and consistent pipeline generation 

• Generate pipeline through proactive outbound prospecting (self-prospection and in partnership with SDs + partners) and effectively manage inbound opportunities 

• Build and maintain a strong, healthy pipeline across all funnel stages, ensuring high activity, progression, and conversion 

• Manage a high volume of opportunities simultaneously, with strong organization, time management, and prioritization discipline 

• Run effective discovery conversations to understand customer needs and position Hiring and Learning solutions accordingly 

• Execute pilot-led sales motions, including onboarding, engagement, and conversion into long-term partnerships 

• Maintain accurate forecasting and high standards of CRM hygiene 

• Consistently meet or exceed quota targets through strong execution and disciplined funnel management 

• Identify and drive cross-sell opportunities, especially expanding into Learning solutions 

• Identify larger strategic opportunities within the territory and navigate them effectively when present 

• Leverage AI tools and data insights to improve productivity, prospecting quality, and deal execution 

• Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams (SDs, ADs, Marketing, Partners) to maximize opportunity creation and success 

• Share market insights and contribute to the development of team best practices





Qualifications



Basic Qualifications:



• Fluency in Spanish and English 

• 3+ years of sales experience 



Preferred Qualifications:



• Proven track record of closing new business in B2B/SaaS environments 

• Experience with HR tech, recruiting solutions, or software sales 

• Strong prospecting, organization, and pipeline management skills 

• Experience managing high-volume sales cycles with efficiency and consistency 

• Data-driven mindset with ability to prioritize and make informed decisions 



Suggested Skills 



• Pipeline Management 

• Territory Planning & Prioritization 

• Time & Volume Management 

• Prospecting Excellence 

• Pilot Management 

• AI Usage for Sales Productivity 

• Consultative / Value-Based Selling 

• Forecasting 

• Cross-functional Collaboration 

• Opportunity Qualification 





Additional Information



Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates 



Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/candidate-portal.

title: Remote Marketing Strategist
skills: Designs high-performance static and dynamic motion ads tailored specifically to the algorithms and specs of Meta, TikTok, and Google Display networks.
Produces short-form video content, kinetic typography, and animations (GIFs, motion graphics) designed to maximize engagement and watch time within paid channels.
Masters platform-specific technical requirements, striking a perfect balance between polished brand content and authentic, high-converting "UGC-style" aesthetics.
Architectures high-fidelity wireframes and designs for standalone landing pages, prioritizing Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and user experience (UX).
Creates visually engaging, responsive layouts for automated email lifecycle flows and editorial newsletters that maximize click-through rates (CTR).
Collaborates daily with the media buying team to audit performance data arrays, rapidly executing design iterations on "winning" assets to extend campaign longevity.
The "Conversion Eye": A profound understanding of visual hierarchy, direct-response design frameworks, and cognitive patterns that naturally guide a user’s eye toward a clear conversion event.
Multi-Disciplinary Toolbelt: Complete professional proficiency across Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects).
Speed & Operational Agility: A proven track record of maintaining exceptional aesthetic standards while operating comfortably at a high-velocity pace inside an agile marketing team.

Data-Informed Portfolio: A comprehensive design portfolio showcasing real-world marketing assets rather than abstract art. The candidate must be equipped to explain the analytical data, testing variables, and conversion "why" behind their design executions.

Workplace Infrastructure: Ownership of a high-performance computer setup capable of handling complex video rendering and multi-frame animation software, a dedicated home office workspace, and a stable, high-speed internet connection.
Practical experience working natively within landing page builders such as Webflow, Unbounce, or Instapage.
Foundational understanding of digital marketing frameworks, including multi-variable A/B testing principles and customer acquisition cost (CAC) goals.
Direct background supporting fast-scaling D2C, E-commerce, or B2G/B2B SaaS performance marketing structures.
Performance-Based Compensation Growth: A wide baseline salary band ($1,200 – $3,000 USD) that rewards top-tier technical capability, high qualifications, and exceptional asset delivery speeds.
Direct Growth Autonomy: Step out of rigid corporate design constraints into a performance-driven sandbox where your creative variations directly scale revenue.
Highly Collaborative Environment: Partner closely with data analysts and media buyers, gaining elite, real-time feedback loops on your design executions.
100% Remote Infrastructure: Long-term, secure full-time contractor engagement managed entirely from the comfort of a dedicated home office.
description:
About the job

HireLatam is a premier recruitment agency that places top Latin American talent in independent contractor roles in US companies. With a proven track record and a commitment to excellence, we're your trusted partner in the pursuit of career success. Our extensive network, personalized approach, and supportive guidance ensure that you're in the best hands to find your next job opportunity.




Job Title: Remote Marketing Strategist (100% Work From Home) 

Location: Remote from Latin America

Position Type: Full-time

Salary: $1,200 – $3,000 USD/month (Fully dependent on creative skill level, qualifications, and design output speed)

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Eastern Time (EST), featuring a structured 1-hour lunch break from 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM EST.




About our Client




Our Client is a fast-growing, data-driven enterprise that relies on cutting-edge digital acquisition to scale its market presence. Operating with a high-velocity, performance-first marketing team, they prioritize conversion metrics over vanity metrics. They foster an agile, collaborative remote environment where creative assets are constantly measured, iterated upon, and optimized to drive real business growth and pipeline value.




The Role




Our Client is seeking a high-output, conversion-oriented Performance Designer to take complete ownership of visual assets across the entire customer acquisition funnel. This is not a traditional branding role focused solely on aesthetics; it is a high-ownership position where design must directly drive performance. The successful candidate will blend creative mastery with analytical reasoning to engineer thumb-stopping social ads, high-converting landing page layouts, engaging email campaigns, and short-form motion graphics that systematically guide users toward a definitive Call to Action (CTA).




Key Responsibilities




Paid Media Ad Creative & Motion Design




Designs high-performance static and dynamic motion ads tailored specifically to the algorithms and specs of Meta, TikTok, and Google Display networks.
Produces short-form video content, kinetic typography, and animations (GIFs, motion graphics) designed to maximize engagement and watch time within paid channels.
Masters platform-specific technical requirements, striking a perfect balance between polished brand content and authentic, high-converting "UGC-style" aesthetics.




Web Layouts, Lifecycle Marketing & Iterative Testing




Architectures high-fidelity wireframes and designs for standalone landing pages, prioritizing Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and user experience (UX).
Creates visually engaging, responsive layouts for automated email lifecycle flows and editorial newsletters that maximize click-through rates (CTR).
Collaborates daily with the media buying team to audit performance data arrays, rapidly executing design iterations on "winning" assets to extend campaign longevity.







Qualifications, Skills, and Key Competencies




Required Qualifications




The "Conversion Eye": A profound understanding of visual hierarchy, direct-response design frameworks, and cognitive patterns that naturally guide a user’s eye toward a clear conversion event.
Multi-Disciplinary Toolbelt: Complete professional proficiency across Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects).
Speed & Operational Agility: A proven track record of maintaining exceptional aesthetic standards while operating comfortably at a high-velocity pace inside an agile marketing team.
Data-Informed Portfolio: A comprehensive design portfolio showcasing real-world marketing assets rather than abstract art. The candidate must be equipped to explain the analytical data, testing variables, and conversion "why" behind their design executions.
Workplace Infrastructure: Ownership of a high-performance computer setup capable of handling complex video rendering and multi-frame animation software, a dedicated home office workspace, and a stable, high-speed internet connection.




Preferred Qualifications




Practical experience working natively within landing page builders such as Webflow, Unbounce, or Instapage.
Foundational understanding of digital marketing frameworks, including multi-variable A/B testing principles and customer acquisition cost (CAC) goals.
Direct background supporting fast-scaling D2C, E-commerce, or B2G/B2B SaaS performance marketing structures.




Benefits




Performance-Based Compensation Growth: A wide baseline salary band ($1,200 – $3,000 USD) that rewards top-tier technical capability, high qualifications, and exceptional asset delivery speeds.
Direct Growth Autonomy: Step out of rigid corporate design constraints into a performance-driven sandbox where your creative variations directly scale revenue.
Highly Collaborative Environment: Partner closely with data analysts and media buyers, gaining elite, real-time feedback loops on your design executions.
100% Remote Infrastructure: Long-term, secure full-time contractor engagement managed entirely from the comfort of a dedicated home office.

description:
About the job

Job Title: Analytics Engineer (Remote)

Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices

title: Associate Brand Manager
skills: Strategic Brand Planning and Insight Analysis : Actively drives the development, execution, and monitoring of annual brand plans while continually analyzing key performance indicators, industry trends, and competitor activities to deliver periodic brand reviews and actionable strategic recommendations.

Integrated Communication and Media Management : Coordinates end-to-end brand communication and media plans across all paid media, experiential activation, and public relations platforms, interfacing directly with agencies from initial creative briefing through to comprehensive final campaign evaluations.

Cross-Functional Commercial Collaboration : Serves as the primary strategic liaison between Sales, Customer Marketing, Global, and Regional teams to pitch marketing initiatives, facilitate key market visits, and uncover collaborative commercial growth opportunities.

Experiential Execution and Brand Advocacy : Leads total execution of brand experiential platforms and value-added packaging projects, maintaining strict brand guardianship across all channels to ensure the trademark is expressed consistently.

Financial and Administrative Performance Management : Manages the operational marketing budget, including comprehensive profit and loss monitoring, monthly advertising and promotion spend management, purchase order generation, and thorough invoice control.

Strategic Relationship and Agency Governance : Directs daily workflows and fosters robust partnerships with internal departments and external creative, PR, and media agencies to ensure all strategic communication output satisfies core business imperatives.

, : Controls assigned project life cycles from resource allocation to closure, leading robust post-evaluation reviews to implement key learnings that continuously optimize overall marketing efficiency.
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a closely related commercial field.
Professional Marketing Experience: Minimum 3 years of proven brand-building, portfolio development, and marketing success stories within fast-moving consumer goods global enterprises.

Analytical and Financial Competency: Strong numerical skills with a demonstrated ability to interpret Nielsen and ISCAM market research data, manage brand profit and loss structures, and optimize commercial performance metrics.

Strategic Communication and Language Skills: Intermediate professional proficiency in written and spoken English, paired with a demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional global brand teams in multicultural environments.
Integrated Creative and Digital Mastery: Technical understanding of modern consumer digital marketing frameworks and contemporary multimedia production trends to drive innovative brand activations.
Experience: preferably in the Wine & Spirits, ready-to-drink (RTD), beer, or FMCG industries.
Project Management: Strong project management skills to handle multiple initiatives simultaneously.
Time Management: Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.
description:
About the job

Quote From Hiring Manage r

The Associate Brand Manager will coordinate and execute the most important initiatives to reinforce the leadership of Jack Daniel´s, one of the upcoming portfolios in Mexico and the world.

Meaningful Work From Day One

The Associate Brand Manager coordinates the execution of comprehensive brand communication initiatives across paid media, experiential activation, and public relations platforms. This professional analyzes market dynamics, consumer behaviors, and competitor competencies to provide actionable insights that directly build brand performance, optimize portfolio value, and support strategic growth plans.

What You Can Expect


 Strategic Brand Planning and Insight Analysis : Actively drives the development, execution, and monitoring of annual brand plans while continually analyzing key performance indicators, industry trends, and competitor activities to deliver periodic brand reviews and actionable strategic recommendations.
 Integrated Communication and Media Management : Coordinates end-to-end brand communication and media plans across all paid media, experiential activation, and public relations platforms, interfacing directly with agencies from initial creative briefing through to comprehensive final campaign evaluations.
 Cross-Functional Commercial Collaboration : Serves as the primary strategic liaison between Sales, Customer Marketing, Global, and Regional teams to pitch marketing initiatives, facilitate key market visits, and uncover collaborative commercial growth opportunities.
 Experiential Execution and Brand Advocacy : Leads total execution of brand experiential platforms and value-added packaging projects, maintaining strict brand guardianship across all channels to ensure the trademark is expressed consistently.
 Financial and Administrative Performance Management : Manages the operational marketing budget, including comprehensive profit and loss monitoring, monthly advertising and promotion spend management, purchase order generation, and thorough invoice control.
 Strategic Relationship and Agency Governance : Directs daily workflows and fosters robust partnerships with internal departments and external creative, PR, and media agencies to ensure all strategic communication output satisfies core business imperatives.
 , : Controls assigned project life cycles from resource allocation to closure, leading robust post-evaluation reviews to implement key learnings that continuously optimize overall marketing efficiency.


What You Bring To The Table


Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a closely related commercial field.
Professional Marketing Experience: Minimum 3 years of proven brand-building, portfolio development, and marketing success stories within fast-moving consumer goods global enterprises.
Analytical and Financial Competency: Strong numerical skills with a demonstrated ability to interpret Nielsen and ISCAM market research data, manage brand profit and loss structures, and optimize commercial performance metrics.
Strategic Communication and Language Skills: Intermediate professional proficiency in written and spoken English, paired with a demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional global brand teams in multicultural environments.
Integrated Creative and Digital Mastery: Technical understanding of modern consumer digital marketing frameworks and contemporary multimedia production trends to drive innovative brand activations.


What Makes You Unique


Experience: preferably in the Wine & Spirits, ready-to-drink (RTD), beer, or FMCG industries.
Project Management: Strong project management skills to handle multiple initiatives simultaneously.
Time Management: Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.


Who We Are

We believe great people build great brands. And we know there is Nothing Better in the Market than a career at Brown-Forman. Being a part of Brown-Forman means you will grow both personally and professionally. You will have the opportunity to solve problems, seize opportunities, and generate bold ideas. You will belong to a place where teamwork matters and where you are encouraged to bring your best self to work.

What We Offer

Total Rewards at Brown-Forman is designed to engage our people to ensure sustainable and profitable growth for generations to come. As a premium spirits company, we offer equitable pay structures for individual and company performance alongside a premium employee experience. We offer a range of premium benefits that reflect our company values and meet the needs of our diverse workforce.

About Monks

Monks is the global, digital-first, data-driven, unitary operating brand of S4 Capital plc. With a legacy of innovation and specialized expertise, Monks combines an extraordinary range of global Marketing and Technology Services to redefine how brands interact with the world. Through Monks.Flow, its flagship AI ecosystem for marketing orchestration, Monks transforms marketing into a growth engine, collapsing timelines and connecting brands to culture in real time. By deploying bespoke intelligent agents across disciplines and delivering culturally relevant, high-impact creative and digital solutions, Monks solves key critical business challenges across the entire brand enterprise to help brands sustain long-term impact.

Monks was named a Contender in The Forrester Wave™: Global Marketing Services, ranks among Cannes Lions' Top 10 Creative Companies (2022-25) and remains the only partner featured in AdExchanger’s Programmatic Power Players list every year (2020-24). Named Adweek’s first AI Agency of the Year (2023) and The One Show’s inaugural AI Pioneer Organization, Monks was also awarded Business Intelligence Group’s 2025 Excellence in Artificial Intelligence Award in both the Organizational and AI Product categories. As a trusted partner to cutting-edge innovators in tech, Monks earned titles such as Optimizely Experimentation Partner of the Year (2025), runner-up for the Adobe Firefly Partner Award (2024), and Workato’s AI Visionary Customer Impact Award (2024). Additionally, Monks achieved a record-breaking number of FWAs and continues to hold the most of any partner.

We are an equal-opportunity employer committed to building a respectful and empowering work environment for all people to freely express themselves amongst colleagues who embrace diversity in all respects. Including fresh voices and unique points of view in all aspects of our business not only creates an environment where we can all grow and thrive but also increases our potential to produce work that better represents—and resonates with—the world around us.

title: Trafficker Digital / Especialista en Paid Media
description:
About the job

Sobre Backdoor Marketing

Somos una agencia de marketing digital que maneja múltiples cuentas. Buscamos un(a) Trafficker Digital que quiera crecer en pauta digital al lado de un equipo con experiencia.




IMPORTANTE — Esquema de colaboración:

Esta es una colaboración como PROFESIONAL INDEPENDIENTE (prestación de servicios profesionales), no una contratación como empleado interno. Tú emites factura (CFDI) por tus servicios. Buscamos personas que puedan facturar o estén dispuestas a darse de alta en el SAT; te orientamos en el proceso.




Responsabilidades:

· Creación, configuración, monitoreo y optimización de campañas en Google Ads y Meta Ads (también LinkedIn y TikTok) para 8 a 10 cuentas.

· Optimización diaria: presupuestos, pujas, públicos y rendimiento. Los creativos los entrega el Content Manager; tú te enfocas en performance.

· Medición y reportes: Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, eventos y conversiones, con métricas clave (CPA, ROAS, CTR).

· Trabajo cercano con el equipo de contenido.




Requisitos:

· 1+ año en pauta digital (Google y Meta Ads), o certificaciones más práctica demostrable.

· Mentalidad analítica y orientación a resultados.

· Manejo de herramientas de IA/automatización para optimizar a escala.

· Autonomía y organización: trabajas por objetivos y entregables.

· Capacidad de emitir CFDI o disposición a darte de alta en RESICO.




Lo que ofrecemos:

· Colaboración como profesional independiente (tú facturas tus servicios).

· Mejor ingreso neto: bajo el régimen RESICO el ISR es de 1 a 2.5%, mucho menor que las retenciones de un sueldo.

· Esquema híbrido: trabajas principalmente desde casa, con visitas ocasionales a oficina o cliente.

· Libertad para manejar otros clientes.

· Pago mensual competitivo más bonos por desempeño.




Para postularte, comparte tu CV y, si tienes, casos o cuentas que hayas manejado.

title: Copywriter
skills: Produce high-quality, well-researched articles optimized for SEO and GEO.
Update articles that are outdated, underperforming, or misaligned with current messaging.
Contribute to proprietary data initiatives, helping compile survey results, analyze data, and shape findings into publishable research assets.
Write high-converting B2B copy across emails, landing pages, case studies, and core website pages.
Use Claude and internal AI workflows to accelerate research and first drafts, then apply strong human judgment to refine and elevate final output.
Collaborate closely with the Content Lead to align on direction, incorporate feedback, and iterate until work meets quality standards.
Maintain messaging, positioning, and brand voice consistency across all content and copy.
Help improve, build, and maintain templates and workflows so high-quality assets can be produced faster over time.
Continuously build domain expertise in our industry and ICPs to increase speed and quality of written assets.
2+ years of B2B marketing content writing or copywriting experience (services, SaaS, or agency).
Outstanding storytelling skills
Knows how to find the interesting angle, the credible source, and the data point that makes a piece worth reading.
Proven ability to write persuasive, conversion-focused copy for web, decks, email, ad campaigns, and other marketing collateral.
Strong self-editing discipline. Expects multiple iterations and improves drafts before feedback.
Experienced in using AI for research and drafting while knowing when heavy human rewriting is required.
World-class portfolio showing strong work across assets such as landing pages, case studies, white papers, articles, and emails.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Ability to hit deadlines, manage multiple projects, and adapt tone by channel and audience.
Startup or agency background.
Experience collaborating with designers to create premium, polished marketing assets.
Familiarity with SEO and A/B testing copy.

Experience with community engagement: Reddit, Quora, LinkedIn, or professional forums. Understands how to contribute helpfully to a conversation rather than just promote. Knows what gets ignored and what earns credibility.
Experience contributing to original research: surveys, data reports, industry studies. Comfortable working with raw data and shaping it into a narrative.
100% remote role.
Compensation in USD.
Time off: 14 vacation days, US working holidays + 4 local floating holidays, birthday off.
Health insurance stipend.
description:
About the job

About us:

At Near, we help top talent in Latin America find remote roles with US companies. Our mission is to create better lives by fostering a remote work culture that transcends borders.




About the role:

We're looking for a writer who can produce content that genuinely stands out. Content that ranks, earns citations, builds credibility, and gives readers something they couldn't get from an AI summary.

You'll spend the majority of your time on content: researching and writing articles, contributing to original research reports, and building the kind of assets that attract attention from humans, Google, and LLMs.

You'll also bring solid copywriting skills that come into play on specific assets: emails, landing pages, and occasionally social media posts.

What we're looking for is someone who raises the bar on what we produce. Someone who brings genuine editorial judgment and the instinct to push past consensus answers toward something worth reading.

You'll work in an AI-augmented environment, using Claude and internal workflows to accelerate research and drafting, but strong human judgment is what separates great output from good output here.

This is a role for someone who can research fast, write clearly, and ship on tight deadlines.




Responsibilities:

Produce high-quality, well-researched articles optimized for SEO and GEO.
Update articles that are outdated, underperforming, or misaligned with current messaging.
Contribute to proprietary data initiatives, helping compile survey results, analyze data, and shape findings into publishable research assets.
Write high-converting B2B copy across emails, landing pages, case studies, and core website pages.
Use Claude and internal AI workflows to accelerate research and first drafts, then apply strong human judgment to refine and elevate final output.
Collaborate closely with the Content Lead to align on direction, incorporate feedback, and iterate until work meets quality standards.
Maintain messaging, positioning, and brand voice consistency across all content and copy.
Help improve, build, and maintain templates and workflows so high-quality assets can be produced faster over time.
Continuously build domain expertise in our industry and ICPs to increase speed and quality of written assets.




Must-Haves:

2+ years of B2B marketing content writing or copywriting experience (services, SaaS, or agency).
Outstanding storytelling skills
Knows how to find the interesting angle, the credible source, and the data point that makes a piece worth reading.
Proven ability to write persuasive, conversion-focused copy for web, decks, email, ad campaigns, and other marketing collateral.
Strong self-editing discipline. Expects multiple iterations and improves drafts before feedback.
Experienced in using AI for research and drafting while knowing when heavy human rewriting is required.
World-class portfolio showing strong work across assets such as landing pages, case studies, white papers, articles, and emails.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Ability to hit deadlines, manage multiple projects, and adapt tone by channel and audience.




Nice-to-Haves:

Startup or agency background.
Experience collaborating with designers to create premium, polished marketing assets.
Familiarity with SEO and A/B testing copy.
Experience with community engagement: Reddit, Quora, LinkedIn, or professional forums. Understands how to contribute helpfully to a conversation rather than just promote. Knows what gets ignored and what earns credibility.
Experience contributing to original research: surveys, data reports, industry studies. Comfortable working with raw data and shaping it into a narrative.




What's in for you:

100% remote role.

Health insurance stipend.

description:
About the job

BAT is evolving at pace into a global multi-category business. Our purpose is to create A Better Tomorrow™ by Building a Smokeless World. 

To achieve our ambition, we are looking for colleagues who are ready to join us on this journey! Tomorrow can’t wait, let’s shape it together! 

British American Tobacco México has an exciting opportunity for a Marketing Global Graduate in Monterrey

Role Summary

Our Global Graduate Program (GGP) is an entry-level opportunity designed for recent college graduates with up to 3 years of work experience who wish to fast track their career within a global organization, and have the possibility, after 18 months of successful completion of our program, to work as a Junior Manager in our organization. BAT is a market leader in over 55 countries with over 55,000 employees.

¿WHAT DOES THIS MEAN FOR YOU? - AN EXPERIENCE LIKE NO OTHER 

For the driven, passionate, and ambitious recent graduates, our Global Graduate Program is the first step towards bigger and better things. It’s a real job from day one with world-class training, international opportunities, and the chance to reach your full potential.

Become a Global Graduate in Marketing

Our Global Graduate Program aims to develop exceptional commercial & strategical business skills - fully understanding the dynamics of the market you are operating in, and how the BAT Marketing departments such as Brands, Trade Marketing & Development, Consumer Experience, Consumer Insights and Foresights, Customer Management work together to achieve outstanding business results.

You will work as part of our accelerated management program in different marketing rotations, starting your career journey at Trade Marketing & Distribution across Mexico and moving forward into different marketing subfunctions in Area Office Monterrey. These rotations will allow you to develop and present strategic business projects addressing real opportunities and creating action plans

Your Key Responsibilities Will Include


Act as the main point of contact for customers, managing orders, providing portfolio recommendations, and optimizing the overall sales process. 
Analyze market trends (Nielsen, Sell Out, Key Accounts) to generate insights and drive portfolio growth actions. 
Develop, monitor, and execute strategic projects for key clients, ensuring alignment with business objectives. 
Track account performance, KPIs, and market performance indicators, defining and implementing action plans. 
Manage demand planning, including NPI forecasts, cycle volumes, and ensuring forecast accuracy for new SKUs. 
Ensure product availability by monitoring inventory levels and coordinating supply chain and volume negotiations. 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (TM&D, Brands, Marketing) to translate insights into execution plans and track results. 
Execute commercial and digital strategies, including trade engagement, e-commerce content, and support for multi-channel campaigns (social media, CRM, Paid Media, etc)


¿ What are we looking for? 


Bachelor´s degree in Finance, Finance and Accounting, Business Intelligence, Global Business, Strategy and Business Transformation, Data Science and Mathematics, Industrial and Systems Engineering, Digital Transformation in Business, Business Management and Administration, Economics, International Finance, Business Engineering Management, Marketing, or related field.
Recent graduates (graduation from 2024 to June 2026).
Up to 1 year of professional experience. Experience in Data Driven Projects.
Fluent in English (advanced proficiency in oral & writing).
Efficient use of MS Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, SharePoint, Teams).
Open to relocate globally - global mobility and national mobility.
Results-driven professional,data-driven, analytical and ambitious, with strong interpersonal, teamwork, and negotiation skills; proactive, adaptable, and self-motivated with the ability to work independently.
Have leadership skills demonstrated through either relevant professional experience or extra-curricular activities within prestigious companies, NGOs, student associations, etc.


¿What we offer you?


We offer a market leading annual performance bonus (subject to eligibility) 
Our range of benefits varies by country and includes diverse health plans, initiatives for work-life balance, transportation support, and a flexible holiday plan with additional incentives 
Your journey with us isn't limited by boundaries; it's propelled by your aspirations. Join us at BAT and become a part of an environment that thrives on internal advancement, where your career progression isn't just a statement – it's a reality we're eager to build together. Seize the opportunity and own your development; your next chapter starts here. 
You'll have access to online learning platforms and personalized growth programs to nurture your leadership skills 
We prioritize continuous improvement within a transformative environment, preparing for ongoing changes. 


¿WHY JOIN BAT?

We’re one of the few companies named as a Global Top Employer by the Top Employers Institute – certified in offering excellent employee conditions.

Collaboration, inclusion and partnership underpin everything we do here at BAT. We are looking forward to enabling every individual to thrive, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, marital or civil partnership status, gender reassignment, race, religion or belief, colour, nationality, ethnic or national origin, disability, age, skills, experience, education, socio-economic and professional background, veteran status, perspectives and thinking styles. We know that embracing talent from all backgrounds is what makes us stronger and best prepared to meet our business goals.

We see the career breaks as opportunities not obstacles. Through The Global Returners program, we support professionals looking to restart their careers after an extended absence from the workforce (e.g. time out caring for family, parental leave, national service, sabbatical and/or starting an own venture).

Come bring your difference and see what is possible for you at BAT. Learn more about our culture and our award-winning employee experience here.

If you require any reasonable adjustments or accommodations to help you perform at your best during the recruitment process, you are encouraged to notify us. We are fully committed to support you by making appropriate arrangements for you to demonstrate your full potential.

title: Community Manager
description:
About the job

Job Title: Community Manager




Job Type: Full-time




Location: Remote - Latin America




Job Summary:




Join our team as a dynamic Community Manager and play a pivotal role in creating a positive, collaborative, and engaged online environment. You will be at the forefront of customer support and community moderation, proactively resolving issues, answering questions, and ensuring a welcoming experience for all members. If you thrive in fast-paced remote settings and are eager to make a meaningful impact every day, this role is for you.




Key Responsibilities:




• Monitor and moderate online communities to ensure a safe, respectful, and inclusive atmosphere.

• Address customer complaints and questions promptly with empathy and professionalism.

• De-escalate conflicts and diffuse tense situations to maintain group harmony.

• Develop proactive engagement strategies to foster a vibrant and active community.

• Collaborate with internal teams to relay feedback and insights from the community.

• Manage time efficiently to handle multiple conversations and tasks in a remote environment.

• Create clear, friendly, and effective written and verbal communications across channels.




Required Skills and Qualifications:




• Proven experience in customer support and online community moderation.

• Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; a genuine care for clear and empathetic messaging.

• Strong conflict management and de-escalation abilities.

• Self-starter attitude with high energy and a proactive approach to problem-solving.

• Excellent time management skills in a remote work setting.

• Keen attention to detail and ability to multitask under pressure.

• Adaptable, with a willingness to go the extra mile to support community needs.




Preferred Qualifications:




• Background in managing large-scale online communities.

• Experience with various community platforms and CRM tools.

• Passion for building lasting relationships and driving positive user experiences.
