description:
About the job

Job Title: Conversational AI Engineer (Remote)
Work Mode: Fully Remote
Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)




Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices
Rate AI responses across key dimensions including correctness, instruction-following, and quality
Write original computer science questions and coding challenges to test AI capabilities
Identify bugs, errors, and inconsistencies in AI-generated code using structured guidelines
Provide clear, constructive, and structured written feedback to improve AI responses
Follow project guidelines, quality standards, and confidentiality requirements




Qualifications

Software engineering experience — junior, mid-level, or senior welcome
Proficiency in one or more of the following: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Swift, or Rust
Strong attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills
Background in full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, or any engineering discipline




Eligibility Requirements

Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations:
Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela




Compensation

Earn up to $34 USD/hr — core project rate with additional performance incentives averaging 7.5% on top
Payments issued weekly via supported payout platforms (e.g., PayPal or AirTM)




Work Arrangement

Fully remote and asynchronous
Flexible workload depending on project availability
Free access to leading AI tools worth $200+/month included




Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.




Ready to put your coding skills to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.

Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.

Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.

Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.

Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.
Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp
Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.

Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).

Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences
description:
About the job

Summary

Description Summary of This Role

Responsible for managing marketing, advertising and promotional activities for various products or channels. Takes steps to measure, enhance, and enrich the position and image of the company through various goals and objectives. Plan and execute day-to-day marketing activities in support of a product, service or channel. Help prepare and adhere to budgets. Oversee creation and delivery of advertising and marketing materials and ensure brand messages are consistent. Collaborate with sales and product to develop strategic partnership activities and implement the execution the identified opportunities.

What Part Will You Play?


Executes and participates in general marketing functions that are more routine in nature, require smaller spend budgets and requires minimal contact with clients. Requires oversight with developing approach for more complex marketing functions which include higher thresholds of spend levels.
Participates in collaboration with business development, customers, product management, sales and other business partners in support of client-customized, content-rich marketing collateral, such as proposals, corporate communication, and other marketing related information for marketing functions more routine in nature. Will make recommendations regarding marketing process. Supports the marketing approach within strategy and budget.
Supports the development of strategic marketing plans for existing lines and participates in the interpretation of plans into “big ideas” to extend the company’s brand vision.
Supports the strategic direction, growth, and vision of assigned strategic growth objectives for the segment and manages the execution of programs. Has minimal client contact.
Supports the development of multiple pieces of promotional and advertising materials, such as press releases, social and digital media published on-line via web sites, twitter, etc.
Based on assigned strategic growth initiatives, builds and maintains existing relationships with internal contacts, external communications consultants and/or agencies. Participates in meetings with internal and/or external clients to understand their ongoing strategies and how relationships can be strengthened within the client’s organization.
Supports the development of product promotion and launch strategies.
Beginning to act as a marketing advocate, communications consultant, and/or liaison for business support units and/or operational units within the organization. Supports communications with leaders in those units on specific communications issues and strategic growth initiatives and coordinates appropriate marketing resources to achieve their functional goals.
Recommends measurements for return on investment (ROI) for marketing projects within the specific goals of building and delivering campaigns, such as internal and external communications, product launches, new business units, acquisitions, and RFP/RFI proposals within planned scope, schedule, cost and quality, and trade shows/events. Tracks costs against measurements.


What Are We Looking For in This Role?

Minimum Qualifications


Bachelor's Degree
Relevant Experience or Degree in: Digital Marketing , Advertising ,
Typically Minimum 3 Years Relevant Exp


Preferred Qualifications


Prefer marketing service or marketing agency experience. Prefer sales force and email automation experience. Prefer payments industry experience.


What Are Our Desired Skills and Capabilities?


Skills / Knowledge - Having wide-ranging experience, uses professional concepts and company objectives to resolve moderately complex issues in creative and effective ways. Having ownership of a sub-function, account or matrix management responsibilities, applies knowledge to meet goals, maintain relationships, propose opportunities to expand the business, and lead matrix teams. Some barriers to entry exist at this level (e.g., dept./peer review).
Job Complexity - Works on complex issues where analysis of situations or data requires an in-depth evaluation of variable factors. Exercises judgment in selecting methods, techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results. Networks with key contacts outside own area of expertise. Builds on/Maintains external relationships of assigned accounts.
Supervision - Determines methods and procedures on new assignments and may coordinate activities of other personnel (Team Lead).
Marketing production execution - Broad marketing services and/or print/production
Communication skills - Including communication with internal or external audiences

description:
About the job

The Role

We're looking for a results-driven Paid Ads Specialist who knows how to turn ad spend into real ROI. You'll run, optimize, and scale campaigns across Meta, Google, and LinkedIn Ads, working closely with our creative and marketing teams to push performance further with every iteration.

We need someone who's equal parts analyst and strategist — comfortable diving into the numbers, but just as confident shaping the creative, messaging, and targeting behind every campaign.




What You'll Do

Plan, launch, manage, and optimize paid campaigns across Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping), and LinkedIn Ads
Build and refine audience targeting strategies, including custom audiences, lookalikes, and retargeting funnels
Analyze performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPC, conversions) and turn data into action
Guide ad creative direction, including copywriting angles, visual concepts, and formats (video, static, UGC-style, carousel, etc.)
Partner with internal teams to continuously improve ad performance
Run A/B tests across audiences, creatives, and messaging
Manage budgets efficiently and scale winning campaigns
Deliver clear performance reports with actionable insights
Stay sharp on platform updates, policy changes, and emerging best practices




What You Bring

Proven experience managing successful campaigns on Meta, Google, and LinkedIn Ads
Track record running campaigns for U.S. or Canadian brands
Strong grasp of performance marketing and conversion optimization
Skill in identifying and targeting the right audience at every funnel stage
Experience shaping or directing ad creative strategy
Strong written and verbal English communication
Sharp analytical instincts and comfort working with performance data
Experience with tracking tools (GA4, Meta Pixel, GTM, etc.)
Self-starter mindset with strong ownership of results




Nice to Have

Experience in wellness, e-commerce, or DTC brands




Why Join Us

Work with a growing, ambitious brand
High autonomy and ownership over your campaigns
A performance-driven culture that gives you room to test, learn, and scale
Real potential for long-term collaboration

description:
About the job

Creator Growth Specialist

Salary: $2,000 USD per month

Type: Full-time

Location: 100% Remote

Role Overview

We are hiring a Creator Growth Specialist to support a portfolio of content creators across audience growth, content strategy, creator operations, and monetization initiatives.

This is not a traditional influencer marketing role. We are looking for someone with hands-on experience working directly with creators to help them grow their audiences, strengthen their personal brands, optimize content performance, and expand revenue opportunities across today's creator economy.

The ideal candidate understands how creators build sustainable businesses through content strategy, audience engagement, platform optimization, and multiple monetization channels.

Key Responsibilities

Manage a portfolio of content creators as their primary point of contact.
Develop and execute audience growth strategies across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Advise creators on content planning, performance optimization, audience engagement, and platform best practices.
Create and manage content calendars to support consistent publishing.
Assist with copywriting, editing, scheduling, publishing, and content organization.
Analyze creator performance and provide data-driven recommendations to improve growth.
Monitor platform updates, creator economy trends, and emerging opportunities.
Identify opportunities to increase audience engagement, reach, follower growth, and content performance.
Support creator monetization through TikTok Shop, affiliate marketing, brand partnerships, LTK, social commerce, YouTube monetization, and other revenue channels.
Help creators identify new monetization opportunities aligned with their audience and content niche.
Track campaigns, partnerships, affiliate programs, and creator performance within internal systems.
Maintain accurate records in CRM platforms, Monday.com, and other operational tools.
Coordinate communication between creators, internal teams, and brand partners.
Support partnership administration, campaign tracking, invoicing, and operational processes.

Requirements

Resume in English.
Native or near-native English proficiency (spoken and written).
3+ years of experience in creator talent management, creator partnerships, creator success, creator operations, or the creator economy.
Proven experience working directly with content creators, influencers, personal brands, or creator rosters.
Demonstrated success helping creators grow audiences, improve content performance, and increase monetization.
Strong understanding of creator business models and the creator economy.
Deep knowledge of TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and emerging creator platforms.
Experience developing content strategies, growth plans, and audience engagement initiatives.
Strong copywriting, content planning, and content optimization skills.
Experience analyzing creator performance metrics and turning insights into actionable recommendations.

description:
About the job

El Puerto de Liverpool es la empresa líder en tiendas departamentales en México. NUESTRA MISIÓN ES SERVIR AL CLIENTE EN TODO LUGAR, TODOS LOS DÍAS, TODA LA VIDA, nuestra visión es ser la mejor opción en servicio, surtido y valor. Nuestros valores nos guían hacia el trabajo en equipo, productividad, innovación e integridad.

description:
About the job

About Bedford

We're an email marketing agency for North American eComm brands. Our standard is 10/10 work, and we're scaling fast!




Role Description

You will own everything that brings amazing emails to life: the execution, the timelines, and the quality control. You will be the operational backbone of 10-15 brands at once. 




You will own:

Own the PM pipeline: manage our PM software to deliver emails on time. Chase approvals. Unblock blockers. Keep the weekly rhythm tight. Keep the team accountable.
Run the execution: build and maintain pop ups, flows, and campaigns.
QA everything: you're the last set of eyes before anything goes live. Links, segments, send times, etc. You check it.




You're a fit if:

Are relentlessly organized and fast
Have a sharp eye for mistakes — typos and broken links don't get past you
Follow up before anyone asks
Communicate clearly and directly
Have worked in eCommerce / DTC before
Have worked at an agency or on a fast-moving team
(Bonus) Know Klaviyo or a similar ESP — flows, campaigns, pop-ups, segments, deliverability




More details:

100% remote: but you must overlap with North American business hours
Paid in USD: reliably, every month
Long-term and stable: we want someone to grow with us for years, with real room to take on more as we scale

title: Junior Media Buyer for a US Performance Marketing Agency (Remote)
skills: Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.
0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.
Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.
description:
About the job

Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that specializes in pairing remote work with top-tier talent!

We are dedicated to connecting talented individuals with remarkable companies in need of their skills. Our goal is to create fulfilling job opportunities for professionals around the world.

Our client:



Looking for a Junior Media Buyer who wants to learn the performance marketing craft properly. This is a hands-in-the-account role from day one for someone obsessed with what makes an ad account scale profitably, not just spend. You will work hand-in-hand with senior buyers to plan, launch, and optimize paid campaigns primarily on Meta, with growing responsibility on AppLovin / Axon.

You don't need years of experience, but you do need sharp instincts, comfort with numbers, and the drive to get great at this fast. You'll be building campaigns, reading data, spotting what's working, and learning to make confident scale/kill decisions across a portfolio of fast-growing DTC e-commerce brands.

This is a high-performance environment built for hungry, ambitious people who take real ownership of their accounts and treat client budgets like their own.

You'll be responsible for


Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.


Requirements


0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Nice to have


Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.


Benefits


Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.

description:
About the job

This role is open to candidates based in LATAM, Africa, and Eastern Europe. Please note that as this role supports U.S.-based clients, candidates must be available to work during U.S. business hours aligned with the client’s time zone.

Our client is a well-established beauty textiles and nighttime beauty brand best known for pioneering the beauty pillowcase category. Over the past decade, the company has built a strong multi-channel presence across Sam’s Club, Costco, Macy’s, Kohl’s, TV commerce, marketplace platforms, and its own DTC ecommerce site. The brand is seeking a commercially minded eCommerce Content Specialist to optimize product detail pages (PDPs) and improve product performance across key retail and marketplace channels.

Location

Fully Remote | 9 AM - 5 PM EST

Role Overview

The eCommerce Content Specialist will own the ongoing optimization of product detail pages across key retail and marketplace accounts.

This role is focused on improving product page effectiveness through stronger content, clearer merchandising, and enhanced on-page storytelling that drives measurable product performance improvements. The ideal candidate is commercially minded, analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in PDP optimization, digital merchandising, and ecommerce content strategy.

The role includes ownership of content optimization, creative coordination, retailer setup processes, live page reviews, and performance tracking across multiple digital retail channels.

Key Responsibilities

PDP Optimization & Digital Merchandising


Improve PDPs across Sam’s Club, Costco, TV commerce, Macy’s, Kohl’s, and marketplace channels
Write and optimize retailer-ready titles, bullets, descriptions, SEO keywords, image callouts, FAQ language, and product setup fields
Identify factors impacting product performance, including weak imagery, unclear value propositions, poor benefit hierarchy, missing education, or incomplete content
Improve on-page storytelling and merchandising effectiveness to support product performance


Creative Coordination & Asset Development


Brief designers on required visual assets including hero images, value callouts, infographics, comparison charts, and promotional creatives
Collaborate with creative teams to ensure assets support merchandising and conversion goals


Retailer Setup & Content Management


Own content and merchandising elements of item setup across retailer systems
Manage retailer templates, product attributes, image submissions, PDP copy fields, asset uploads, setup trackers, and post-launch reviews
Review live pages to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and optimization quality


Performance Tracking & Cross-Functional Collaboration


Maintain weekly performance trackers showing updates, launch timing, and resulting performance impact
Track product page performance improvements and monitor KPI progress across channels
Partner with sales operations, design, account management, operations, supply chain, and finance teams to ensure PDPs remain accurate and optimized
Support the rollout of optimization initiatives across active digital accounts over time


Qualifications

Experience


3–6 years of experience in ecommerce, digital merchandising, marketplace management, digital shelf strategy, retail content, or PDP optimization
Strong experience with PDP copywriting and marketplace content optimization
Experience working with designers or creative teams
Experience tracking SKU-level performance and conducting basic performance analysis
Experience within beauty, personal care, home, textiles, bedding, or similar consumer categories preferred
Familiarity with platforms such as Sam’s Club, Costco.com, Walmart, Target, Macy’s, Kohl’s, Amazon, Mirakl, DSCO, CommerceHub, or Scene7 preferred


Skills


Strong commercial mindset with an understanding of performance-driven digital merchandising
Strong copywriting abilities with the ability to translate product features into customer-focused benefits
Ability to diagnose underperforming product pages and identify optimization opportunities
Comfortable working within retailer systems, ecommerce platforms, item setup templates, asset folders, and tracking systems
Strong organizational, analytical, and detail-oriented skills
Ability to manage multiple projects and optimization initiatives simultaneously
Comfortable working in a KPI-driven environment focused on measurable performance outcomes


What Success Looks Like


Improved product page performance and measurable sales lift across optimized PDPs
High-quality and timely implementation of PDP updates and merchandising improvements
Strong creative briefs, optimized PDP content, and effective merchandising strategies
Consistent tracking, reporting, and optimization discipline across channels
Scalable PDP optimization processes successfully implemented across active retail accounts


Opportunity

This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing consumer brand with strong digital sales momentum and a multi-channel retail presence. The eCommerce Content Specialist will play a key role in improving how products are presented and merchandised online while driving measurable performance improvements across major retail and marketplace platforms. The role offers direct impact on ecommerce growth, cross-functional collaboration, and the opportunity to help scale optimization systems across a rapidly expanding business.

Application Process

To be considered for this role these steps need to be followed:


Fill in the application form
Record a video showcasing your skill sets

Somos una agencia global, especialista en medios, marketing y tecnología. Líderes en el ramo con presencia en más de 100 países. Creamos soluciones integrales para todos nuestros clientes de forma rápida y eficaz.

Nuestra búsqueda constante de mejorar en lo que hacemos comienza contactando con personas como tú.

OMG, te invita a unirte a nuestro equipo como: “Digital Executive”

Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.

title: Product Manager - Contract
skills: You have 3+ years of experience in Product Management or similar roles (Business Analyst, Product Owner), ideally within a brand, agency, or consultancy environment.
You have a proven track record of delivering large-scale digital commerce projects, including platform migrations from legacy systems like SFCC, Magento, or Hybris to modern SaaS ecosystems.
You’re deeply familiar with Shopify Plus and the broader commerce technology stack — from ERP and OMS to PIM, CRM, CDP, and payments.
You thrive in enterprise stakeholder environments, collaborating confidently with C-suite, product, and engineering teams.
You’re fluent in agile delivery practices (Scrum, SAFe) and discovery frameworks, with a structured yet flexible mindset.
You’re an exceptional communicator and facilitator who can bring clarity, alignment, and focus to complex, multi-stakeholder projects.
You combine technical literacy (APIs, integrations, architecture fundamentals) with strong commercial acumen, always focused on ROI and client value.
You’re analytical and detail-oriented, comfortable defining and tracking KPIs that measure success and impact.
You’re adaptable and thrive in ambiguity — driving clarity, protecting scope, and helping teams deliver meaningful results.
Experience supporting multi-market or international merchants.
Familiarity with CRO, experimentation, and analytics tools.
Experience building or scaling a product management practice within an agency.
Lead client discovery sessions post-sale to understand business goals, customer journeys, and operational processes.
Partner with Technical Architects, Solutions Engineers, and Delivery Managers to define clear project scope and alignment.
Translate discovery findings into a product vision, measurable objectives, and an agreed scope baseline.
Support decision-making around change requests, scope variations, and timeline impacts, balancing commercial, technical, and client needs.
Build and maintain a structured product backlog — defining epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria with clarity and priority.
Facilitate trade-off discussions with client and internal teams, ensuring alignment with scope and outcomes.
Own the roadmap and prioritization process for migrations, new builds, and optimization projects.
Work closely with Delivery Managers, Technical Architects, and Engineers to ensure delivery aligns with defined goals.
Provide continuous product context during sprints, removing ambiguity and safeguarding scope boundaries.
Support UAT and client enablement before and after releases.
Focus on KPIs tied to conversion, AOV, retention, scalability, and operational efficiency.
Review delivered functionality with clients, recommending iterative improvements while maintaining scope discipline.
Act as a strategic product partner, driving growth and long-term value for enterprise Shopify clients.
Help establish Product Management as a discipline within the agency — building frameworks for discovery, documentation, and delivery.
Mentor peers in product-led, scope-driven thinking across teams.
Contribute to agency thought leadership, developing case studies and best practices for enterprise commerce.
Discovery and requirements gathering produce clear, aligned, and agreed-upon scopes.
Delivery teams operate with clarity and confidence, minimizing scope creep and misalignment.
Change requests are transparent and data-driven, with well-communicated trade-offs.
Clients experience measurable business impact and trust in our delivery.
Product Management becomes a recognized pillar that elevates delivery quality and client success.
🚀 Accelerate Your Growth: Work across multiple industries and cutting-edge projects with a team that ships fast.
💥 Maximum Impact: Shape the future of the tech industry by helping ambitious projects reach their potential.
🏅 True Ownership: Everyone ships code and has real autonomy with minimal meetings.
💡 Continuous Learning: Be part of a team of senior engineers and designers who love learning and knowledge sharing.
🤖 You Resist Modern Tools: We leverage AI and cutting-edge technology to build rapidly and focus our energy on solving the most complex, high-impact challenges for our clients.
🏗️ You Crave High Structure: We thrive in an autonomous, fast-moving environment, which means you need to be comfortable with some ambiguity.
😴 You Prefer Conventional Careers: Our consulting approach involves varied projects and direct client interaction — it's not for everyone.
1️⃣ You Like Staying in One Lane: Our projects require adapting to different tech stacks and modern tooling quickly.
🌐 Work From Anywhere: Choose your workspace — all you need is strong wifi and a passion for building!
🧘‍♂️ Work / Life Balance: We believe in our team’s ability to have it all; a great career, and time to unplug and live…you know...life.
🩺 Employee Care: We provide full benefits (healthcare, dental, vision) for our employees (401k for our US employees)
🏖️ Unlimited PTO: Everyone needs a break. Take at least 15 days off a year, and more if you need—just be cool about it and keep the team in mind.
🎉 Regular Team Retreat: Join us for a week of team bonding at amazing destinations. Recent trips include the Dominican Republic, Cancun, and Hawaii — plus ones welcome.
description:
About the job

Lazer is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!

Lazer Commerce is a specialized team within Lazer focused on crafting scalable, high-performing commerce experiences across the Shopify ecosystem. We partner with forward-thinking brands and agencies to design and implement custom storefronts, headless architectures, and robust backend integrations. From theme development to complex ERP and OMS workflows, our engineers bring deep expertise in Shopify, modern frameworks, and commerce infrastructure to help clients launch, scale, and optimize their digital retail experiences.

The Role

We’re looking for a Product Manager to help shape, define, and deliver large-scale Shopify commerce experiences for leading brands.

In this role, you’ll bridge the gap between strategy, delivery, and technology — translating discovery insights into actionable roadmaps and ensuring every project delivers measurable value.

Please Note: This is a Contract position (hourly rate). We welcome applications from across the globe, but our preferred candidates should be able to have a meaningful overlap with Eastern Standard Timezone (EST).

Who You Are


You have 3+ years of experience in Product Management or similar roles (Business Analyst, Product Owner), ideally within a brand, agency, or consultancy environment.
You have a proven track record of delivering large-scale digital commerce projects, including platform migrations from legacy systems like SFCC, Magento, or Hybris to modern SaaS ecosystems.
You’re deeply familiar with Shopify Plus and the broader commerce technology stack — from ERP and OMS to PIM, CRM, CDP, and payments.
You thrive in enterprise stakeholder environments, collaborating confidently with C-suite, product, and engineering teams.
You’re fluent in agile delivery practices (Scrum, SAFe) and discovery frameworks, with a structured yet flexible mindset.
You’re an exceptional communicator and facilitator who can bring clarity, alignment, and focus to complex, multi-stakeholder projects.
You combine technical literacy (APIs, integrations, architecture fundamentals) with strong commercial acumen, always focused on ROI and client value.
You’re analytical and detail-oriented, comfortable defining and tracking KPIs that measure success and impact.
You’re adaptable and thrive in ambiguity — driving clarity, protecting scope, and helping teams deliver meaningful results.


Bonus Points If You Have


Experience supporting multi-market or international merchants.
Familiarity with CRO, experimentation, and analytics tools.
Experience building or scaling a product management practice within an agency.


What You'll Do

Discovery & Scope Definition


Lead client discovery sessions post-sale to understand business goals, customer journeys, and operational processes.
Partner with Technical Architects, Solutions Engineers, and Delivery Managers to define clear project scope and alignment.
Translate discovery findings into a product vision, measurable objectives, and an agreed scope baseline.
Support decision-making around change requests, scope variations, and timeline impacts, balancing commercial, technical, and client needs.


Backlog & Roadmap Management


Build and maintain a structured product backlog — defining epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria with clarity and priority.
Facilitate trade-off discussions with client and internal teams, ensuring alignment with scope and outcomes.
Own the roadmap and prioritization process for migrations, new builds, and optimization projects.


Collaboration & Execution


Work closely with Delivery Managers, Technical Architects, and Engineers to ensure delivery aligns with defined goals.
Provide continuous product context during sprints, removing ambiguity and safeguarding scope boundaries.
Support UAT and client enablement before and after releases.


Value Realization & Optimization


Focus on KPIs tied to conversion, AOV, retention, scalability, and operational efficiency.
Review delivered functionality with clients, recommending iterative improvements while maintaining scope discipline.
Act as a strategic product partner, driving growth and long-term value for enterprise Shopify clients.


Agency & Practice Building


Help establish Product Management as a discipline within the agency — building frameworks for discovery, documentation, and delivery.
Mentor peers in product-led, scope-driven thinking across teams.
Contribute to agency thought leadership, developing case studies and best practices for enterprise commerce.


What Success Looks Like


Discovery and requirements gathering produce clear, aligned, and agreed-upon scopes.
Delivery teams operate with clarity and confidence, minimizing scope creep and misalignment.
Change requests are transparent and data-driven, with well-communicated trade-offs.
Clients experience measurable business impact and trust in our delivery.
Product Management becomes a recognized pillar that elevates delivery quality and client success.


AI in our hiring process

We use AI to help us review and shortlist applications based on job-related criteria. A human hiring manager always makes the call on who moves forward. As a company that builds with AI every day, we're all for candidates using it too — just be upfront about how it helped.

Why Work With Us


🚀 Accelerate Your Growth: Work across multiple industries and cutting-edge projects with a team that ships fast.
💥 Maximum Impact: Shape the future of the tech industry by helping ambitious projects reach their potential.
🏅 True Ownership: Everyone ships code and has real autonomy with minimal meetings.
💡 Continuous Learning: Be part of a team of senior engineers and designers who love learning and knowledge sharing.


Why This Might Not Be For You


🤖 You Resist Modern Tools: We leverage AI and cutting-edge technology to build rapidly and focus our energy on solving the most complex, high-impact challenges for our clients.
🏗️ You Crave High Structure: We thrive in an autonomous, fast-moving environment, which means you need to be comfortable with some ambiguity.
😴 You Prefer Conventional Careers: Our consulting approach involves varied projects and direct client interaction — it's not for everyone.
1️⃣ You Like Staying in One Lane: Our projects require adapting to different tech stacks and modern tooling quickly.


Benefits & Perks


🌐 Work From Anywhere: Choose your workspace — all you need is strong wifi and a passion for building!
🧘‍♂️ Work / Life Balance: We believe in our team’s ability to have it all; a great career, and time to unplug and live…you know...life.
🩺 Employee Care: We provide full benefits (healthcare, dental, vision) for our employees (401k for our US employees)
🏖️ Unlimited PTO: Everyone needs a break. Take at least 15 days off a year, and more if you need—just be cool about it and keep the team in mind.
🎉 Regular Team Retreat: Join us for a week of team bonding at amazing destinations. Recent trips include the Dominican Republic, Cancun, and Hawaii — plus ones welcome.

title: Influencer & Branded Content Coordinator
skills: Support the execution of influencer marketing campaigns from start to finish, helping to deliver outstanding, creative work for global brands.
Serve as a reliable day-to-day contact for clients—managing updates, timelines, and deliverables to ensure smooth communication and collaboration.
Partner with Account Managers and Directors to develop campaign briefs, creator contracts, and proposals, ensuring clarity and accuracy.
Contribute to pitches and presentations, helping bring creative ideas to life through data, insights, and storytelling.
Collaborate across influencer, creative, and strategy teams to deliver cohesive, effective client campaigns.
Track campaign performance and analyse data to identify key insights and learnings.
Maintain organized campaign folders, documentation, and reports, ensuring all information is accurate and easy to access.
Stay current on creator trends, platform updates, and brand partnerships, identifying new opportunities to elevate client work.
Monitor budgets, timelines, and performance targets to support the achievement of campaign and revenue goals.
Demonstrate curiosity and initiative—actively seeking opportunities to improve processes and contribute to the team’s success.
1-2+ years of experience in Influencer & Branded Content, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience.
Understanding of content creation and influencer marketing strategy, supporting campaign execution and brand partnerships.
Strong attention to detail orientation, ensuring accuracy and consistency in influencer and branded content initiatives.
Experience in project implementation, helping coordinate and manage influencer collaborations.
Basic proficiency in presentation skills, effectively communicating campaign results and insights.
Familiarity with advertising standards, client service, and relationship management, ensuring seamless influencer partnerships.
Exposure to influencer marketing dashboards and social media platforms, optimizing campaign tracking and performance analysis.
Experience in networking and influencer management, fostering strong industry relationships for impactful collaborations.

A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value.
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel.
Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support.
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones.
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events.
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching.
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses.
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography.
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances.
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being.
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available.
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus.
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities.
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety.
description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

At PMG, our Influencer & Branded Content team is at the intersection of culture, storytelling, and strategy, helping brands connect with audiences in authentic, meaningful ways. We craft high-impact influencer campaigns that go beyond traditional advertising - driving engagement, building brand affinity, and delivering measurable results across social, digital, and experiential platforms.

You’ll collaborate with creators, talent agencies, media strategists, content teams, and brand partners to develop and execute influencer marketing programs that seamlessly align storytelling with business objectives. Whether it’s identifying the right talent, negotiating partnerships, overseeing content production, or optimizing campaign performance, your role will be instrumental in shaping how brands foster meaningful connections with their audiences.

Beyond execution, you’ll play a role in exploring new content formats, leveraging emerging platforms, and staying ahead of industry trends to ensure influencer strategies are not only relevant but also innovative and impactful. At PMG, we don’t just follow trends - we create them.

As an Influencer & Branded Content (title level), if you’re passionate about shaping culture through creator-driven storytelling, using data to drive real impact, and redefining what’s possible in influencer marketing, this is the place to make your mark.

What You Will Be Doing


Support the execution of influencer marketing campaigns from start to finish, helping to deliver outstanding, creative work for global brands. 
Serve as a reliable day-to-day contact for clients—managing updates, timelines, and deliverables to ensure smooth communication and collaboration. 
Partner with Account Managers and Directors to develop campaign briefs, creator contracts, and proposals, ensuring clarity and accuracy. 
Contribute to pitches and presentations, helping bring creative ideas to life through data, insights, and storytelling. 
Collaborate across influencer, creative, and strategy teams to deliver cohesive, effective client campaigns. 
Track campaign performance and analyse data to identify key insights and learnings. 
Maintain organized campaign folders, documentation, and reports, ensuring all information is accurate and easy to access. 
Stay current on creator trends, platform updates, and brand partnerships, identifying new opportunities to elevate client work. 
Monitor budgets, timelines, and performance targets to support the achievement of campaign and revenue goals. 
Demonstrate curiosity and initiative—actively seeking opportunities to improve processes and contribute to the team’s success. 


What You Will Bring


1-2+ years of experience in Influencer & Branded Content, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience. 
Understanding of content creation and influencer marketing strategy, supporting campaign execution and brand partnerships. 
Strong attention to detail orientation, ensuring accuracy and consistency in influencer and branded content initiatives. 
Experience in project implementation, helping coordinate and manage influencer collaborations. 
Basic proficiency in presentation skills, effectively communicating campaign results and insights. 
Familiarity with advertising standards, client service, and relationship management, ensuring seamless influencer partnerships. 
Exposure to influencer marketing dashboards and social media platforms, optimizing campaign tracking and performance analysis. 
Experience in networking and influencer management, fostering strong industry relationships for impactful collaborations. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a Continual Learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a Customer-Focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to People-Focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by Leading by Example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

title: Associate Brand Manager
skills: Strategic Brand Planning and Insight Analysis : Actively drives the development, execution, and monitoring of annual brand plans while continually analyzing key performance indicators, industry trends, and competitor activities to deliver periodic brand reviews and actionable strategic recommendations.

Integrated Communication and Media Management : Coordinates end-to-end brand communication and media plans across all paid media, experiential activation, and public relations platforms, interfacing directly with agencies from initial creative briefing through to comprehensive final campaign evaluations.

Cross-Functional Commercial Collaboration : Serves as the primary strategic liaison between Sales, Customer Marketing, Global, and Regional teams to pitch marketing initiatives, facilitate key market visits, and uncover collaborative commercial growth opportunities.

Experiential Execution and Brand Advocacy : Leads total execution of brand experiential platforms and value-added packaging projects, maintaining strict brand guardianship across all channels to ensure the trademark is expressed consistently.

Financial and Administrative Performance Management : Manages the operational marketing budget, including comprehensive profit and loss monitoring, monthly advertising and promotion spend management, purchase order generation, and thorough invoice control.

Strategic Relationship and Agency Governance : Directs daily workflows and fosters robust partnerships with internal departments and external creative, PR, and media agencies to ensure all strategic communication output satisfies core business imperatives.

, : Controls assigned project life cycles from resource allocation to closure, leading robust post-evaluation reviews to implement key learnings that continuously optimize overall marketing efficiency.
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a closely related commercial field.
Professional Marketing Experience: Minimum 3 years of proven brand-building, portfolio development, and marketing success stories within fast-moving consumer goods global enterprises.

Analytical and Financial Competency: Strong numerical skills with a demonstrated ability to interpret Nielsen and ISCAM market research data, manage brand profit and loss structures, and optimize commercial performance metrics.

Strategic Communication and Language Skills: Intermediate professional proficiency in written and spoken English, paired with a demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional global brand teams in multicultural environments.
Integrated Creative and Digital Mastery: Technical understanding of modern consumer digital marketing frameworks and contemporary multimedia production trends to drive innovative brand activations.
Experience: preferably in the Wine & Spirits, ready-to-drink (RTD), beer, or FMCG industries.
Project Management: Strong project management skills to handle multiple initiatives simultaneously.
Time Management: Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.
description:

The Associate Brand Manager will coordinate and execute the most important initiatives to reinforce the leadership of Jack Daniel´s, one of the upcoming portfolios in Mexico and the world.

description:
About the job

This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Performance Marketing Specialist (Part-Time) based in Mexico.

This is a hands-on, data-driven digital marketing role focused on driving measurable growth across paid media channels. You will be responsible for optimizing performance campaigns across Meta and Google Ads, turning insights into actionable improvements that directly impact lead generation and conversion outcomes. The role blends campaign execution, analytics, and experimentation, requiring a strong focus on ROI, attribution accuracy, and continuous optimization. You will also support tracking infrastructure using tools such as GA4 and Google Tag Manager to ensure clean, reliable marketing data. Working in a remote-first and collaborative environment, you will contribute to both strategic and tactical marketing decisions. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving performance puzzles, testing ideas quickly, and seeing clear business impact from their work. It offers the opportunity to work across global clients while shaping scalable digital growth strategies.

Accountabilities


Plan, manage, and optimize paid media campaigns across Meta Ads and Google Ads to drive qualified lead generation and improve ROI.
Execute ongoing campaign testing across audiences, creatives, bidding strategies, and landing pages to continuously improve performance.
Monitor and analyze campaign performance data, translating insights into actionable recommendations for optimization and growth.
Maintain accurate tracking and attribution systems using tools such as GA4, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and related conversion tracking platforms.
Ensure seamless flow of marketing data into CRM and marketing automation systems for accurate reporting and lead management.
Support SEO initiatives by contributing to on-page optimization and identifying opportunities for organic growth improvements.
Develop and deliver monthly performance reports, highlighting key metrics, insights, and optimization opportunities.
Identify trends, competitor movements, and emerging opportunities in digital marketing to inform campaign strategy.
Collaborate with stakeholders to improve messaging, creative direction, and conversion-focused strategies across campaigns.
Continuously optimize conversion rates and campaign efficiency across all digital channels.


Requirements


Minimum 2+ years of hands-on experience managing and optimizing paid media campaigns.
Strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads, with proven ability to drive performance outcomes.
Solid working knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking systems.
Experience working with CRM platforms, marketing automation tools, and lead generation workflows.
Strong understanding of performance marketing fundamentals including attribution, funnel optimization, and ROI measurement.
Ability to analyze campaign data and translate insights into clear, actionable recommendations.
Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively with internal and external stakeholders.
Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and thrive in a remote, fast-paced environment.
Nice to have: exposure to SEO, landing page optimization, and multi-channel attribution models.


Benefits


Fully remote work setup with flexible working arrangements (part-time schedule).
Work-from-home support including company-provided equipment and connectivity assistance.
Exposure to international clients and global marketing environments.
Flexible work-life balance with a structured part-time schedule.
Opportunities for ongoing learning, professional development, and skill growth.
Collaborative, people-first culture that values autonomy and accountability.
Employee engagement activities, both virtual and in-person events.
Opportunity to directly impact campaign performance and measurable business growth.

About the job

Please submit your resume in English - we can only consider applications submitted in this language.

Only applications of candidates with Mexican citizenship will be evaluated for this role in compliance with the provisions of Article 7 of the Federal Labor Law.Minimum qualifications:


Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
1 year of experience with industry standard design tools (e.g., Photoshop, Illustrator, Sketch, InVisio, Figma, Principle, etc.).
Portfolio highlighting design principles for web or mobile platforms.
Ability to communicate in English fluently to support client relationship management in this region.


Preferred qualifications:


1 year of experience leading design projects. 
Experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, or agentic AI systems.
Familiarity with the concepts of dynamic, on-demand, or AI-generated interfaces, and an understanding of how to design components that adapt to agent outputs.
Knowledge of Generative AI tools (e.g., Gemini) into the daily workflow for tasks such as ideation, drafting placeholder copy, synthesizing research, or generating assets.
Understanding of the basic capabilities, limitations, and probabilistic nature of Large Language Models (LLMs) and agentic systems.
Ability to articulate design rationale and advocate for user needs to a cross-functional audience.


About The Job

At Google, we "Focus on the user and all else will follow." Our Interaction Designers transform complex tasks into intuitive, easy-to-use experiences for billions of people. From creating user flows and wireframes to building mockups and prototypes, you will envision and bring product experiences to life with an inspired, refined, and magical feel. You will join our multi-disciplinary UX team, collaborating with Engineering and Product Management, leveraging user insights to create industry-leading products.

As an Interaction Designer, you'll apply user-centered design methods to craft industry-leading user experiences from concept to execution, working with design partners to evolve the Google design language to build beautiful, innovative products.

User experience is at the forefront of how we create intuitive, innovative, and beautiful products that people love. We strive to learn and understand our users’ needs, behaviors, and emotions to gather insights that inform product strategy and design. Our UX teams include designers, researchers, content strategists, and engineers who are passionate about quality, usability, and simplicity. We work on collaborative teams to solve complex challenges and craft experiences that highlight our products’ unique capabilities and personalities. Our work touches billions while exemplifying a key principle that is core to Google’s philosophy: “Focus on the user and all else will follow.”

Responsibilities


Participate in design critiques. Be comfortable presenting your work, clearly articulating the design rationale, and open to receiving and acting upon feedback from executive team members.
Demonstrate a willingness to learn new tools, technologies, and domain knowledge. Seek to upskill AI literacy and stay current with emerging multimodal interaction patterns.
Escalate barriers, technical roadblocks, or ambiguous AI-feature requirements to the manager or executive stakeholders when appropriate, ensuring you don't stay blocked for long.
Contribute to a positive team culture and demonstrate respect for various perspectives in all cross-functional and team interactions.



Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

description:
About the job

Role: Social Media & Content Assistant (Personal Branding or Influencer Collaboration Experience Required)

Contract: Part-time Remote Contractor (10 hours weekly / 40 hours monthly)

Service Hours: Monday through Friday, flexible within 9 AM – 5 PM PST

Rate: $10 - $12 USD hourly (Salary is negotiable based on experience and location) 

Availability to Start: Immediately




Client's Profile

This US-based company is a cultural consultancy and storytelling agency that supports brands and organizations through content creation, influencer partnerships, and strategic communications. They take a hands-on, personalized approach to help clients navigate today's fast-changing media landscape, build authentic connections with their audience, and create meaningful, engaging brand narratives that drive long-term impact.




What You'll Do

As a Social Media & Content Assistant, you’ll play a key role in driving content development and supporting overall brand growth. This position is suited for someone who can take ownership of managing a high-profile digital presence, contributing across video editing, copywriting, content publishing, proactive outreach, and community engagement. You will act as a strategic execution partner, helping shape and maintain a consistent, impactful online presence. Your core responsibilities will include the following:




Content Creation

Copywriting & Captions Creation: Draft "human-voiced," on-brand copy and captions aligned with the Founder's tone and messaging for Instagram and LinkedIn.
Graphic Creation: Create high-quality visual assets using Adobe Creative Suite and Canva for social and event-related content.
Video Creation: Transform raw footage, founder insights, or training clips into polished, high-engagement short-form videos optimized for platform performance.
LinkedIn Content Creation: Repurpose long-form content, founder emails, and thought leadership into structured, professional LinkedIn posts.
Content Optimization: Continuously refine content based on engagement metrics, audience behavior, and platform trends.




Content Calendar Management

Own and manage the monthly content calendar across platforms, including planning, organization, and scheduling.
Ensure all content is created, reviewed, approved, and scheduled for timely and consistent posting.
Manage publishing across platforms, ensuring accuracy, formatting, and brand consistency.
Coordinate directly with the Founder to align content with business priorities, campaigns, and events.




Event Outreach & Support

Proactively identify, research, and vet speaking opportunities, partnerships, and relevant organizations.
Manage outreach and application processes for speaking engagements using the existing database and outbound efforts.
Maintain and update an organized outreach pipeline, including tracking submissions, follow-ups, and outcomes.
Support event preparation by creating branded speaker decks, social assets, and coordinating logistics as needed.




Community Management

Monitor, manage, and respond to social media comments and messages in a timely manner using approved response templates.
Maintain and expand the community response database, ensuring consistency in tone and messaging.
Track engagement trends, sentiment, and recurring inquiries, escalating high-value opportunities or risks to the Founder.




What You Should Have

Must-haves:

At least 5+ years of experience in Social Media Management or Content Assistant roles; must be able to work independently and "lead the way."
Proven experience in personal branding or prior experience working directly with an influencer, founder, or public-facing personal brand (non-negotiable).
At least 1 year of experience working in a global remote environment with a North America–based company.
Proven ability to manage time effectively and adhere to strict deadlines.
Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and Express, as well as Canva.
Deep familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn native publishing, engagement tools, and community management.
Strong storytelling ability with a knack for turning complex topics and real-world conversations into relatable content.
Must be 100% transparent regarding AI usage for drafting; must possess the editorial skill to refine AI outputs so they remain authentic and on-brand.




Technology Specifications: 

Minimum 100 Mbps Internet Speed
Windows 11 or MacOS 15 Sequoia
Minimum Intel i5 8th gen with 8GB RAM or Apple M1 chip with 8GB RAM
Webcam and Headset
Designated Office Space in your Home




Nice-to-haves:

Experience with Gorgias (or similar CRM) for sentiment analysis and engagement tracking.
Familiarity with project management tools like Notion.




Who You Are

We are hoping you are someone who:

Has clear and effective communication regarding project status and the use of AI tools.
Is comfortable working in an environment that is actively building its systems and processes from the ground up.
Demonstrates strong empathy and awareness when engaging with and responding to community interactions.

About the job

PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH




Advanced Agent Marketing Client Success Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: TIMDEE2

🏢 Industry: Financial and Advisory Services

🌎 Location: LATAM

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

⏰ Work Schedule: The Client Success Support Specialist must be available during Eastern Standard Time business hours, especially during the hours when clients are actively taking apps, attending appointments, and submitting support requests. (9:00am to 5:00pm EST)

💰 Salary: This role pays approximately $10/hour, depending on experience and fit.

🚀 Target Start Date: asap




ROLE OVERVIEW




We are looking for a Client Success Support Specialist to support our Customer Success Managers with client communication, technical questions, CRM updates, app/order tracking, refund and credit-back requests, and basic conflict resolution.

This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, highly organized, strong in written English, and comfortable helping clients work through process or technology-related questions. The right person will be able to communicate clearly, keep accurate records, follow up consistently, and make good decisions without needing step-by-step direction for every situation.




Key Responsibilities




The Client Success Support Specialist will assist the Customer Success team by answering client tech questions, helping clients understand apps and internal processes, and making sure client information is accurately updated in the CRM. This person will help monitor client availability, check integrations, track app/order status, and make sure clients understand how many apps they have remaining in their order.

This role will also help quality-check disposition calls, confirm that clients are following the correct appointment process, and make sure clients complete required Google Sheets or tracking forms after calls. The specialist will communicate with internal team members about apps that have been requested for credit-back, refund review, or additional follow-up.

In addition, this person will support offboarding, document client concerns, and help de-escalate frustrated clients in a professional manner. Common client situations may include refund requests, app credit-back requests, clients saying they were not looking for an annuity, did not want a specific state, had a poor call experience, did not want to join Zoom, or are already working with another advisor.




Core Responsibilities




Client Support

Answer client questions, provide written support, and help resolve basic client issues.

Technical Assistance

Help clients with app-related questions, tool access, integrations, and process confusion.

CRM Updates

Update client records, track availability, document issues, and maintain clean client data.

App & Order Tracking

Make sure clients receive apps on time and understand how many apps remain in their order.

Credit-Back & Refund Support

Track requests, communicate status internally, and gather context needed for review.

Process Follow-Up

Ensure clients follow the appointment process and complete required Google Sheets after calls.

Conflict Resolution

Help diffuse client frustration and escalate issues appropriately when needed.

Offboarding Support

Assist with client offboarding, documentation, and final communication steps.

Required Skills and Experience

The ideal candidate must be comfortable working across multiple systems and communicating quickly with both clients and internal team members. Experience with GoHighLevel/GHL and Slack is required. Strong written English is also important because this role involves client communication, internal updates, and accurate documentation.

We are not looking for someone who is simply “point and shoot.” This person needs to understand the situation, use good judgment, and decide when to resolve an issue directly versus when to escalate it to a Customer Success Manager or backend closer.
